# MuleSoft IDP

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (master) of IDP documentation.
> See [IDP llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/idp/llms-full.txt) for all the IDP documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Adding Reviewers](https://docs.mulesoft.com/idp/adding-reviewers.md)
- [Analyzing Documents With Custom User-Defined Schemas](https://docs.mulesoft.com/idp/analyzing-documents-with-einstein.md)
- [Processing Documents and Retrieving Results With RPA](https://docs.mulesoft.com/idp/automate-document-processing-with-rpa.md)
- [Processing Documents and Retrieving Results With the API](https://docs.mulesoft.com/idp/automate-document-processing-with-the-idp-api.md)
- [Best Practices and Optimization](https://docs.mulesoft.com/idp/best-practices-and-optimization.md)
- [Analyzing Documents Using Pre-Built Schemas](https://docs.mulesoft.com/idp/creating-document-actions.md)
- [Data Extraction Best Practices](https://docs.mulesoft.com/idp/data-extraction-best-practices.md)
- [Getting Started with Document Processing](https://docs.mulesoft.com/idp/document-processing.md)
- [Enhancing Data Extraction with Einstein](https://docs.mulesoft.com/idp/enhancing-data-extraction-with-einstein.md)
- [Example Einstein Prompts](https://docs.mulesoft.com/idp/example-einstein-prompts.md)
- [IDP Glossary](https://docs.mulesoft.com/idp/glossary.md)
- [IDP Overview](https://docs.mulesoft.com/idp/index.md)
- [Integrating IDP with Anypoint Studio](https://docs.mulesoft.com/idp/integrating-idp-with-anypoint-studio.md)
- [Performance Benchmarks](https://docs.mulesoft.com/idp/performance-benchmark.md)
- [IDP Permissions](https://docs.mulesoft.com/idp/permissions.md)
- [Publishing Document Actions](https://docs.mulesoft.com/idp/publishing-document-actions.md)
- [Quotas and Limits](https://docs.mulesoft.com/idp/quotas-and-limits.md)
- [IDP Release Notes](https://docs.mulesoft.com/idp/release-notes.md)
- [Reviewing Processed Documents](https://docs.mulesoft.com/idp/reviewing-processed-documents.md)
- [Security Best Practices](https://docs.mulesoft.com/idp/security-best-practices.md)
- [Supported Models](https://docs.mulesoft.com/idp/supported-models.md)
